## Guardrails

- [ ] No investment/yield/return/price/buy/sell/ownership language added.
- [ ] No secrets, key paths, `.env.local`, or dashboard tokens committed.
- [ ] Simulated/unverified/live states remain clearly separated.
- [ ] The seal remains the only source of `Valid` / `Invalid` truth.
